name: useBrowserLocation
description: Hook that returns reactive browser location state with navigation controls
examples: const { value, push, back, forward, go } = useBrowserLocation();

returns.name: The
returns.description: current browser location state and navigation methods

source.source: * @returns {UseBrowserLocationReturn} The current browser location state and navigation methods
